subject: Correction to GCN Circular 21305: Trigger 760835: Swift misidentification of GRS1716-249
body:
. L. Page (U Leicester) reports on behalf of the
Swift Team:

Trigger 760835, when BAT misidentified known source GRS 1716-249 as a
different source due to a known race condition, occurred at 02:34:04 UT,
rather than 03:34:04 UT as stated in GCN Circular 21305. Apologies for any
confusion caused.
